name: Hot Chocolate Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 package Instant Nonfat Dry Milk - 25.6 oz (10 2/3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the package of Instant Nonfat Dry Milk and measure out 25.6 ounces (10 2/3 cups).
2. Open the jar of Powdered Non-Dairy Creamer and measure out 6 ounces.
3. Open the can of Instant Chocolate Drink Mix and measure out 16 ounces.
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl or measuring cup, stirring until well mixed.
5. Store any remaining mix in an airtight container for future use.
